label: Scope & Controls
description: Global scope summary with active org, client, and strategy selectors, intervention controls, and terminal link.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary — global in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89, covers all widgets.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: — added Skeleton loading state guarded by ctx.coreLoading.

0.7.note: — control-bar; always renders scope + actions regardless of strategy count; !ctx guard covers context-absent case.

0.8.note: Global WidgetErrorBoundary sufficient; no thrown errors expected from this render path.

0.9.note: — removed dead alias kpiStrategies, replaced with filteredSortedStrategies directly.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary — global in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89, covers all widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=['execution-basic','execution-full']. 0.3 availableOn=['overview']. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore — Record<string,unknown> used correctly. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 FIXED — added Skeleton loading state guarded by ctx.coreLoading. 0.7 N/A — control-bar; always renders scope + actions regardless of strategy count; !ctx guard covers context-absent case. 0.8 Global WidgetErrorBoundary sufficient; no thrown errors expected from this render path. 0.9 FIXED — removed dead alias kpiStrategies, replaced with filteredSortedStrategies directly.

1.1.note: Data via useOverviewDataSafe() hook only — no inline fetch or direct import.

1.2.note: Scope reading is in use-overview-page-data.ts (the context producer) which calls useGlobalScope() twice (lines 117, 247); overview-data-context.tsx is a pure value container — valid architecture.

1.3.note: Org filter applied in use-overview-page-data.ts lines 258-261 filtering strategyPerformance by context.organizationIds.

1.4.note: Client filter cascades via context.clientIds lines 264-267.

1.5.note: Strategy filter cascades via context.strategyIds lines 270-272.

1.6.note: Empty scope = all data — each filter block guarded by .length > 0 check, so empty arrays skip filtering.

1.7.note: (read-only): overview-data-context.tsx imports types PnLBreakdown and TimeSeriesPoint from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data — these are type-only imports of data shapes, not runtime reference data constants; acceptable for L1 but should be migrated to lib/types/ in a future pass.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useOverviewDataSafe() hook only — no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2 Scope reading is in use-overview-page-data.ts (the context producer) which calls useGlobalScope() twice (lines 117, 247); overview-data-context.tsx is a pure value container — valid architecture. 1.3 Org filter applied in use-overview-page-data.ts lines 258-261 filtering strategyPerformance by context.organizationIds. 1.4 Client filter cascades via context.clientIds lines 264-267. 1.5 Strategy filter cascades via context.strategyIds lines 270-272. 1.6 Empty scope = all data — each filter block guarded by .length > 0 check, so empty arrays skip filtering. 1.7 FINDING (read-only): overview-data-context.tsx imports types PnLBreakdown and TimeSeriesPoint from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data — these are type-only imports of data shapes, not runtime reference data constants; acceptable for L1 but should be migrated to lib/types/ in a future pass.

knownIssues: overview-data-context.tsx imports PnLBreakdown and TimeSeriesPoint types from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data — type-only imports but should migrate to lib/types/ in future pass
findings: L0/0.6: Widget had no loading skeleton — fixed by adding coreLoading guard with Skeleton placeholders matching the control-bar layout
L0/0.9: Dead alias `const kpiStrategies = filteredSortedStrategies` removed; filteredSortedStrategies used directly at all three callsites
L1/1.7: Context file (read-only) imports types from lib/mocks/fixtures — type-only so not a runtime issue, but noted for future migration
